mapper.sql: id , tenant_id, parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, ancestors, dept_level, leader_user_id, phone, email, sort_no, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from sys_dept
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept (tenant_id, parent_id, dept_code, dept_name, ancestors, dept_level, leader_user_id, phone, email, sort_no, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ancestors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{leaderUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into sys_dept
tenant_id,
parent_id,
dept_code,
dept_name,
ancestors,
dept_level,
leader_user_id,
phone,
email,
sort_no,
status,

create_time,

mapper.update:
update sys_dept
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_id = #{row.parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
dept_code = #{row.deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_name = #{row.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ancestors = #{row.ancestors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_level = #{row.deptLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
leader_user_id = #{row.leaderUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
phone = #{row.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{row.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update sys_dept set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_id = #{row.parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_code = #{row.deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{row.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ancestors = #{row.ancestors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_level = #{row.deptLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, leader_user_id = #{row.leaderUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, phone = #{row.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{row.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update sys_dept
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
dept_code = #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ancestors = #{ancestors,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_level = #{deptLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
leader_user_id = #{leaderUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_dept set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_code = #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ancestors = #{ancestors,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_level = #{deptLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, leader_user_id = #{leaderUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
